parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  runId: $json.runId,
  sourceBucket: $json.bucketName,
  sourceKey: $json.s3Key,
  fileName: $json.fileName,
  partnerHint: $json.partnerHint,
  parserStatus: $json.parserStatus,
  contractText: $json.contractText,
  sourceType: $json.sourceType,
  extractedAt: $json.extractedAt
} }}
